CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c)), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Retainer_Agreement_Signed_Entered_At__c)), Retainer_Agreement_Signed_Entered_At__c - Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Turned_Down_Entered_At__c)), Turned_Down_Entered_At__c - Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Referred_Out_Entered_At__c)), Referred_Out_Entered_At__c - Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(Converted_Entered_At__c)), Converted_Entered_At__c - Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c, IF( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Retainer Agreement Sent"), NOW() - Retainer_Agreement_Sent_Entered_At__c, NULL ) ) ) ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: Time in Retainer Sent (Days)
